Lparameters pVal, pTip, pJMe, pJDi, pDtB, pDtF
* pVal = Valor Base
* pTip = Tipo de Cálculo (1=Simples; 2=Composto)
* pJMe = Juros ao Męs
* pJDi = Juros ao Dia (Só é Relevante Se Năo Informar o pJMe)
* pDtB = Data Base
* pDtF = Data Final do Cálculo (Se Năo Passar Usa a Data Atual)

Local llEnable

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

	.poDataMgr  = CreateObject('fSqlConector','SIGPRCFN',.t.)

	.getValorBas... [TRUNCADO]
=fConfigGeral()

Local llEnable

llEnable = .f.
If (This.Value < 0)
	=Messagebox([O Valor Base Precisa Ser Positivo!], 0+48, [Atençăo!!!])
	Return .f.
Else
	llEnable = .t.
EndIf

With ThisForm
	.optCalculo.Option1.Enabled = llEnable
	.optCalculo.Option2.Enabled = llEnable

	.getJurosMes.Enabled   = llEnable
	.getJurosDia.Enabled   = llEnable
	.getDataBase.Enabled   = llEnable
	.getDataFinal.Enabled  = llEnable
	.getDias.Enabled       = llEnable

	.Calculos()
EndWith
* Fim ****************************************... [TRUNCADO]
ThisForm.Calculos()

Local lnJurosDia

If (ThisForm.optCalculo.Value = 1)
	*Juros Simples
	lnJurosDia = Round(This.Value / 30, 9)
Else
	*Juros Compostos
	lnJurosDia = Round((((1+This.Value/100) ^ (1/30)) - 1) * 100, 9)
EndIf

ThisForm.getJurosDia.Value = lnJurosDia
ThisForm.getJurosDia.Refresh

ThisForm.Calculos()
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Not Empty(ThisForm.getValorBase.Value)

Local lnJurosMes

If (ThisForm.optCalculo.Value = 1)
	*Juros Simples
	lnJurosMes = Round(This.Value * 30, 2)
Else
	*Juros Compostos
	lnJurosMes = Round((((1+This.Value/100) ^ (30)) - 1) * 100, 2)
EndIf

ThisForm.getJurosMes.Value = lnJurosMes
ThisForm.getJurosMes.Refresh

ThisForm.Calculos()
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Not Empty(ThisForm.getValorBase.Value)

If Not Empty(ThisForm.getDataFinal.Value) And Not Empty(This.Value)
	If (This.Value > ThisForm.getDataFinal.Value)
		=Messagebox([A Data Base Năo Pode Ser Maior Que a Data Final!], 0+48, [Atençăo!!!])
		Return .f.
	EndIf 

	ThisForm.getDias.Value = (ThisForm.getDataFinal.Value - This.Value)
EndIf 

ThisForm.Calculos()
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Not Empty(ThisForm.getValorBase.Value)

If Not Empty(ThisForm.getDataBase.Value) And Not Empty(This.Value)
